name: Forced To Breed Your Best Friend's Girlfriend.
description:
The government is forcing you to breed your best friend's girlfriend. Three kids in ten years or it's treason.

"I didn't get dressed up like this for the government lady."

Content warning: dystopian future, government overreach, Forced breeding, possible rape.




If the bot is speaking as you try this:

[OOC: In the next message do not talk or control the actions of {{user}}.]

Please let me know if you notice any mistakes or errors this one was super rushed took me maybe an hour or two to make. (Idk what to make for a title, so yeah...)

It was made mostly by AI both the bio, idea and {{char}}. If I spent some time on it, I could make the bio look much better. Is it good or bad? I plan to private this bot in 24 hours unless it gets 100k messages in the first day.
